name: boxFill
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.pass === null || typeof output.result.pass === 'boolean'
_note: Pure compute. NecCalculators sends lensRun('electrical','boxFill',{...}) → body.input flat → handler reads artifact.data (== params). NEC 314.16: equivalents = hots + grounds(all=1) + clamps(all=1) + devices×2 + support fittings; required = equivalents × per-AWG volume; PASS when provided box volume ≥ required. Fail-closed: every count sanitises via num() + clamps to ≥0 integer, and an Infinity/NaN box volume sanitises to 0 → treated as 'no volume entered' → pass:null (NEVER a fake PASS on an unverifiable box — the dangerous failure mode). Cards render totalConductorEquivalents/requiredBoxVolume/providedBoxVolume/breakdown[].{item,equivalents}/pass/verdict EXACTLY (field-aligned against BoxFillCalc). No STATE, no DB.
